Created attachment 191229
patch file

* Update to 8.0.1
* Add APACHE20 license (qpdf is dual licensed since v7 [1])
* Bump print/cups-filters PORTREVISION on dependency SONAME change [2]

Changes: http://qpdf.sourceforge.net/files/qpdf-manual.html#ref.release-notes

QA:
  poudriere testport: OK (11a, 10i)

[1] https://github.com/qpdf/qpdf/blob/master/README.md
[2] https://abi-laboratory.pro/tracker/objects_report/qpdf/7.1.1/8.0.0/report.html
